---
title: "Coordinate Systems"
description: "Coordinate frames, element placement, local charts, ports, and geometric conventions."
audience: physics
status: experimental
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

This chapter collects the current coordinate-system and placement language for
OPALX. It has been migrated from the OPALX physics notes and is being checked
against the orbit-threading and element-placement implementation.

{{< include _quick-reader.qmd >}}

{{< include _design-principles.qmd >}}

{{< include _geometric-background.qmd >}}
